title: SHIFA HEALING CENTER - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE SHIFA HEALING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides holistic mental health and substance abuse services. 6835 SW Clinton Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Walk in: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm By appointment only: Saturday-Sunday, no standard hours Email (971) 249-8064 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 249-8064 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. OHP and other major insurance plans accepted. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card LANGUAGES: English, Amharic, Somali, Swahili AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - UPLIFT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BRIDGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE
